flavour_text: Some tasks are too important to entrust to others.
records.name: Lone Messenger
stats:
You can only have one Herald
50% more Effect of Herald Buffs on you
100% more Damage with Hits from Herald Skills
50% more Damage Over Time with Herald Skills
Minions from Herald Skills deal 25% more Damage
Your Aura Skills are Disabled

flavour_text: Why should I dodge blows that I do not fear?
records.name: Iron Reflexes
stats: Converts all Evasion Rating to Armour. Dexterity provides no bonus to Evasion Rating

flavour_text: My ancestral pact was sealed. Forevermore, I would gain sustenance
only from the ravaged flesh of my enemies.
records.name: Vaal Pact
stats:
Life Leech from Melee Damage is Instant
Cannot Recover Life other than from Leech

flavour_text: Invite the enemy when you are strong, evade them when you are weak;
strike with the coming of the storm.
records.name: Wind Dancer
reminder_text: (Recently refers to the past 4 seconds)
stats:
20% less Attack Damage taken if you haven't been Hit by an Attack Recently
10% more chance to Evade Attacks if you have been Hit by an Attack Recently
20% more Attack Damage taken if you have been Hit by an Attack Recently

flavour_text: Give up everything in pursuit of greatness - even life itself.
records.name: Chaos Inoculation
stats: Maximum Life becomes 1, Immune to Chaos Damage

flavour_text: Legend tells of bows so powerful that only giants could draw them back.
records.name: Iron Grip
stats: Strength's Damage bonus applies to Projectile Attack Damage as well as Melee Damage

flavour_text: All are invited to his feast, one way or another.
records.name: Disciple of Kitava
reminder_text: (Recently refers to the past 4 seconds)
stats:
Every second, Consume a nearby Corpse to Recover 5% of Life and Mana
10% more Damage taken if you haven't Consumed a Corpse Recently

flavour_text: Tainted blood is a gift that must be shared.
records.name: Bloodsoaked Blade
reminder_text: (Weeping Wounds cause you to lose 1% of your maximum Life per second per stack. Tinctures deactivate when you have 1 life remaining)
stats:
Tinctures inflict Weeping Wounds instead of Mana Burn
Effects that interact with Mana Burn interact with Weeping Wounds instead

flavour_text: My blade sings so sweetly, your body cannot help but weep.
records.name: Crimson Dance
stats:
You can inflict Bleeding on an Enemy up to 8 times
Your Bleeding does not deal extra Damage while the Enemy is moving and cannot be Aggravated
50% less Damage with Bleeding

flavour_text: Even in death, they have their uses. They just need a little encouragement.
records.name: Minion Instability
stats: Minions Explode when reduced to Low Life, dealing 33% of their Life as Fire Damage to surrounding Enemies

flavour_text: Put your faith in intellect rather than mysticism.
records.name: The Agnostic
stats:
Removes all Energy Shield
While not on Full Life, Sacrifice 20% of Mana per Second to Recover that much Life

flavour_text: Never start the war... but be sure to end it.
records.name: Arsenal of Vengeance
stats: Damaging Retaliation Skills become Usable every sixth Hit from Enemies instead

flavour_text: Burn the spirit to vitalise the flesh.
records.name: Eternal Youth
stats:
50% less Life Regeneration Rate
50% less maximum Total Life Recovery per Second from Leech
Energy Shield Recharge instead applies to Life

flavour_text: You are not a vanishing spark, but a patient ember waiting to seed a great fire.
records.name: Elemental Overload
stats:
Skills that have dealt a Critical Strike in the past 8 seconds deal 40% more Elemental Damage with Hits and Ailments
Your Critical Strikes do not deal extra Damage
Ailments never count as being from Critical Strikes

flavour_text: Follow me, and I will show you strength!
records.name: Call to Arms
stats:
Your Warcries do not grant Buffs or Charges to You
100% more Warcry Duration

flavour_text: Your foes will beg not for their pitiful lives, but for a quick, merciful death.
records.name: Perfect Agony
reminder_text: (Ailments are Bleeding, Ignited, Scorched, Chilled, Frozen, Brittle, Shocked, Sapped, and Poisoned)
stats:
Damage over Time Multiplier for Ailments is equal to Critical Strike Multiplier
Critical Strikes do not deal extra Damage
Non-Critical Strikes cannot inflict Ailments

flavour_text: To me, brave companions! Feel my radiance flow through you!
records.name: Conduit
stats: Share Endurance, Frenzy and Power Charges with nearby party members

flavour_text: Embrace the forbidden. Let dark energies envelop you.
records.name: Wicked Ward
stats:
Energy Shield Recharge is not interrupted by Damage if Recharge began Recently
40% less Energy Shield Recharge Rate

flavour_text: I will wear your ghost, and you will die twice: against me, and for me.
records.name: Ghost Reaver
stats:
Leech Energy Shield instead of Life
Maximum total Energy Shield Recovery per second from Leech is doubled
Cannot Recharge Energy Shield

flavour_text: Layer only your most vital areas, child. We have less steel,
but we are willing to bleed, and that is why we will be victorious.
records.name: Imbalanced Guard
reminder_text: (Armour is treated as this percentage of its actual value, only for calculating damage mitigation)
stats:
100% chance to Defend with 200% of Armour
Maximum Damage Reduction for any Damage Type is 50%

flavour_text: You can feel the fungus growing in your skull,
bringing not pain, but religious ecstasy.
records.name: Worship the Blightheart
reminder_text: (Allies on your Consecrated Ground Regenerate a percentage of their Maximum Life per second, and Curses have 50% reduced effect on them)
(Allies on your Fungal Ground have +25% to Chaos Resistance. Enemies on your Fungal Ground have -10% to all Resistances.)
stats: Create Fungal Ground instead of Consecrated Ground

flavour_text: To win, all you must do is outlast.
records.name: Nature's Patience
reminder_text: (Up to 10 Vines can grasp you, inflicting 8% less Movement Speed per Vine. Broken by moving)
stats:
Gain 2 Grasping Vines each second while stationary
2% chance to deal Double Damage per Grasping Vine
1% less Damage taken per Grasping Vine

flavour_text: Embrace the pain, drink it in.
Your enemies will know your agony tenfold.
records.name: Pain Attunement
stats: 30% more Spell Damage when on Low Life

flavour_text: Great tacticians learn that consistency often trumps potential.
records.name: Resolute Technique
stats:
Your hits can't be Evaded
Never deal Critical Strikes

flavour_text: Know when you'll be hit, and you'll barely feel it.
records.name: Veteran's Awareness
reminder_text: (Maximum Resistances cannot be raised above 90%)
(Recently refers to the past 4 seconds)
stats:
+10% to all Elemental Resistances and maximum Elemental Resistances while affected by a Non-Vaal Guard Skill
20% additional Physical Damage Reduction while affected by a Non-Vaal Guard Skill
20% more Damage taken if a Non-Vaal Guard Buff was lost Recently

flavour_text: While the mind endures, so too will the body.
records.name: Mind Over Matter
stats: 40% of Damage is taken from Mana before Life

flavour_text: Surround yourself with the dead,
so that you may avoid joining them.
records.name: Ghost Dance
stats:
Cannot Recover Energy Shield to above Evasion Rating
Every 2 seconds, gain a Ghost Shroud, up to a maximum of 3
When Hit, lose a Ghost Shroud to Recover Energy Shield equal to 3% of your Evasion Rating

flavour_text: When winning is all that matters, you'll use everything at your disposal.
records.name: Pitfighter
stats: 1% increased Fishing Line Strength

flavour_text: Balance is good in all things, but especially in the realm of magic.
records.name: Elemental Equilibrium
stats:
Hits that deal Elemental Damage remove Exposure to those Elements and inflict Exposure to other Elements
Exposure inflicted this way applies -25% to Resistances

flavour_text: Utter trust in your defence unleashes ultimate potential.
records.name: Glancing Blows
stats:
Chance to Block Attack Damage is doubled
Chance to Block Spell Damage is doubled
You take 65% of Damage from Blocked Hits

flavour_text: No force wasted, no time wasted.
records.name: Kineticism
reminder_text: (Bleeding deals Physical Damage over time, based on the base Physical Damage of the Skill. Damage is 200% higher while moving)
(Maimed enemies have 30% reduced Movement Speed)
stats:
Attack Projectiles always inflict Bleeding and Maim, and Knock Back Enemies
Projectiles cannot Pierce, Fork or Chain

flavour_text: Stand your ground, child, keep your senses.
The pain is fleeting, but victory is forever.
records.name: Unwavering Stance
stats:
Cannot Evade enemy Attacks
Cannot be Stunned

flavour_text: A wooden construct, mute and blind.
But fear the wrath of shackled mind.
records.name: Ancestral Bond
stats:
You can't deal Damage with Skills yourself
+1 to maximum number of Summoned Totems

flavour_text: Look your foe in the eyes before you pierce him. Delight in his fear.
records.name: Point Blank
stats: Projectile Attack Hits deal up to 30% more Damage to targets at the start of their movement, dealing less Damage to targets as the projectile travels farther

flavour_text: An arcane pattern, secrets bound. Blind truth splinters with lies abound.
records.name: Runebinder
stats:
-1 to maximum number of Summoned Totems
You can have an additional Brand Attached to an Enemy

flavour_text: Hear these words but once and they will echo in your nightmares forever.
records.name: Hex Master
stats:
Your Hexes have infinite Duration
20% less Effect of your Curses

flavour_text: "In my dreams I see a great warrior, his skin scorched black, his fists aflame."
records.name: Avatar of Fire
stats:
50% of Physical, Cold and Lightning Damage Converted to Fire Damage
Deal no Non-Fire Damage

flavour_text: I give you everything, my pets. My trust, my strength, my safety. Do not disappoint me.
records.name: Necromantic Aegis
stats: All bonuses from an Equipped Shield apply to your Minions instead of you

flavour_text: You are the heart of the empire, shining bright so that all are lifted up by your light.
Let none tell you otherwise.
records.name: Supreme Ego
stats:
Auras from your Skills can only affect you
Aura Skills have 1% more Aura Effect per 2% of maximum Mana they Reserve
40% more Mana Reservation of Aura Skills

flavour_text: Legend tells of incantations so powerful that only giants could recite them.
records.name: Iron Will
stats: Strength's Damage bonus applies to all Spell Damage as well

flavour_text: To master the arena, you must be prepared for anything.
records.name: Versatile Combatant
reminder_text: (Overcapped Chance to Block is the amount by which Uncapped Chance to Block is higher than Maximum Chance to Block)
(Uncapped Chance to Block is the value Chance to Block would have if ignoring Maximum Chance to Block)
stats:
-10% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage
-10% to maximum Chance to Block Spell Damage
+2% Chance to Block Spell Damage for each 1% Overcapped Chance to Block Attack Damage

flavour_text: Light and unadorned, like wind on water, you will be.
records.name: Acrobatics
stats:
Modifiers to Chance to Suppress Spell Damage instead apply to Chance to Dodge Spell Hits at 50% of their value
Maximum Chance to Dodge Spell Hits is 75%

flavour_text: Let the whistling of arrows and stones be your music.
records.name: Arrow Dancing
stats:
Evasion Rating is Doubled against Projectile Attacks
25% less Evasion Rating against Melee Attacks

flavour_text: What need have I for defence when my enemies
are reduced to ash and splinters?
records.name: Eldritch Battery
stats:
Spend Energy Shield before Mana for Skill Mana Costs
Energy Shield protects Mana instead of Life
50% less Energy Shield Recharge Rate

flavour_text: To avert a mystical assault, you must be absolutely still.
records.name: Magebane
reminder_text: (40% of Damage from Suppressed Hits and Ailments they inflict is prevented)
stats:
Dexterity provides no inherent bonus to Evasion Rating
+1% Chance to Suppress Spell Damage per 15 Dexterity

flavour_text: Punish your enemies with the excessive cruelty of a tyrant,
then move on without a second thought.
records.name: The Impaler
stats:
When your Hits Impale Enemies, also Impale other Enemies near them
Inflict 5 additional Impales on Enemies you Impale
For 5 seconds after you Impale Enemies, they cannot be Impaled again, and Impales cannot be Called from them

flavour_text: Lay open your veins, and draw power from your own spilled life.
records.name: Blood Magic
stats:
Removes all mana
10% more maximum Life
Skills Cost Life instead of Mana
Skills Reserve Life instead of Mana

flavour_text: Even within the realm of torture, there are subtle intricacies.
records.name: Secrets of Suffering
reminder_text: (Scorched Enemies have their Elemental Resistances lowered by up to 30%, based on the Fire Damage of the Hit, for 4 seconds)
(Hits have up to +6% Critical Strike Chance against Brittle Enemies, based on the Cold Damage of the Hit which inflicted Brittle, for 4 seconds)
(Sapped Enemies deal up to 20% less Damage, based on the Lightning Damage of the Hit, for 4 seconds)
stats:
Cannot Ignite, Chill, Freeze or Shock
Critical Strikes inflict Scorch, Brittle and Sapped

flavour_text: My faith is my shield.
records.name: Divine Shield
reminder_text: (Recently refers to the past 4 seconds)
stats:
Cannot Recover Energy Shield to above Armour
3% of Physical Damage prevented from Hits Recently is Regenerated as Energy Shield per second

flavour_text: "The mastodons of yore were each born with two weapons greater than any sword. So, too, were you." - Maraketh Proverb
records.name: Hollow Palm Technique
reminder_text: (You are Unencumbered while you have no Gloves, no Main Hand Item, and no Off Hand Item Equipped)
stats:
You count as Dual Wielding while you are Unencumbered
40% more Attack Speed with Melee Skills while you are Unencumbered
Adds 14 to 20 Attack Physical Damage to Melee Skills per 10 Dexterity while you are Unencumbered

flavour_text: To know yourself is to understand existence - and understanding brings control.
records.name: Solipsism
reminder_text: (Elemental Ailments are Ignited, Scorched, Chilled, Frozen, Brittle, Shocked, and Sapped)
stats:
Intelligence provides no inherent bonus to Energy Shield
2% reduced Duration of Elemental Ailments on you per 15 Intelligence

flavour_text: A sip of poison each day keeps the shadow of death at bay.
records.name: Lethe Shade
reminder_text: (Ailments are Bleeding, Ignited, Scorched, Chilled, Frozen, Brittle, Shocked, Sapped, and Poisoned)
stats:
Take 50% less Damage over Time if you've started taking Damage over Time in the past second
100% more Duration of Ailments on you

flavour_text: Tear my flesh and splinter my bones. You will never break my spirit.
records.name: Zealot's Oath
stats: Life Regeneration is applied to Energy Shield instead

flavour_text: Fear not the warrior that has practiced ten thousand techniques once.
Fear the warrior that has practiced one technique ten thousand times.
records.name: Precise Technique
stats:
40% more Attack Damage if Accuracy Rating is higher than Maximum Life
Never deal Critical Strikes
